description: sort_values na_position='last'→'first' moves NaN to front

_meta.explanation: na_position='first' places NaN values before the sorted non-NaN values. Sorting order of non-NaN values is unchanged.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 1. Clean single-parameter, unambiguous output change.
